case_title: FEINER, MICHAEL H VS BAY AREA AUTOMOTIVE

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF APPEARED WITH DENNIS M. CARR, ESQ. DEFENDANT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. HEARING BEGAN AT 9:45 A.M. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THAT ALL WITNESSES WAIT OUTSIDE OF
M DISCOUNT BREAK & CLUTCH FOR $7,355.10; TWO INVOICES FROM DISCOUNT BREAK & CLUTCH THAT HAD NO PRICE; TWO INVOICES FROM DODGE DEALERSHIP; DECEMBER
-EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF WAS FOLLOWED BY TESTIMONY OF JASON WONG (PREVIOUSLY SWORN AT THE START OF TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS) ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF.
AND THEREFORE ATTORNEY FEES WERE DENIED.
